case_title: MARLOW, DONNY VS FROST, JAY SHAWN 6TH FL. C/O SHEMANO GROUP

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-23-2004, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO OCT-08-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 EMPLOYMENT TERMINATION.
CERT MAIL SENT TO DONNY MARLOW RETURNED SIGNED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,960.66 FILED BY MARLOW, DONNY AS TO DEFENDANT FROST, JAY SHAWN 6TH FL. C/O SHEMANO GROUP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-23-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARLOW, DONNY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FROST, JAY SHAWN 6TH FL. C/O SHEMANO GROUP PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM OFF CALENDARED. PLAINTIFF TO RE-SET AND RE-SERVE DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT DOES NOT WAIVE PROOF OF SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $700.00 FILED BY FROST, JAY SHAWN 6TH FL. C/O SHEMANO GROUP AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT MARLOW, DONNY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-08-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT FROST, JAY SHAWN 6TH FL. C/O SHEMANO GROUP RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT MARLOW, DONNY $640.75 PRINCIPAL, $32.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $672.75, CONCURRENTLY WITH PAYMENT OF THIS JUDGMENT, CROSS-COMPLAINT SHALL RETURN THE FOLLOWING - THE 1986 MAZDA B200 L/BED, JM2UF1115G0637971. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT FROST, JAY SHAWN 6TH FL. C/O SHEMANO GROUP
